emails.subject: Mike Haney Prospects
emails.body: Mike Haney Prospects Hello all... Attached is my list of prospects, including a rough prioritization. Jake and I continue to analyze the financial institutions sector, so we may have some revisions to this list. Best regards, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Mike Haney Prospects
emails.body: RE: Mike Haney Prospects Add Barrick Gold to your list. They like Enron, and Bruce Garner has had extensive discussions with them.

emails.subject: RE: Mike Haney Prospects
emails.body: Andy: Sounds great, will do. I attempted telephone contact with Bruce yesterday and today; I'll continue to pursue him to tap his brain on contacts and prospects. Thanks, Mike To: Haney, Mike
